news.title: AI Agent Goes Viral in China - Reuters
news.snippet: The AI agent, which can connect several hardware and software tools and learn from the data produced with much less human intervention than a chatbot, has gone viral in China.

tech.title: Most Advanced AI in 2026: 14 Tools, Rankings, Use Cases
tech.snippet: While most advanced AI systems work from a fixed knowledge snapshot, Grok 4.1 continuously pulls live information from X alongside standard web search. Complex multi-step reasoning over long documents, with up to a 2M token context window.
